CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,006.00 FILED BY AMERICAN TAXI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA: VETERANS CAB COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TAXI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT AMERICAN TAXI RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA: VETERANS CAB COMPANY $809.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $841.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA: VETERANS CAB COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN TAXI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
